steps.title: Apply the margin of error
steps.content:
The estimate is $8.4$, and the margin of error is $1.3$. Subtract and add the margin:

$$8.4-1.3=7.1$$
$$8.4+1.3=9.7$$

steps.title: Interpret the interval
steps.content:
The plausible interval for the actual mean is

$$7.1\leq \text{mean}\leq 9.7$$

This describes the company mean, not every individual employee. The answer is B.
